title: citrus × lapinii
intro: Citrus × lapinii, also known as the Meyer lemon, is a citrus hybrid plant resulting from the cross between a lemon and an orange. The plant's medicinal properties are primarily attributed to its high content of vitamin C and flavonoids, which are known to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of consuming Meyer lemon include its potential to boost the immune system, aid in digestion, and help to reduce stress levels. Herbal preparations of Citrus × lapinii include its use as a tea, juice, or zest, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory issues.
